products.name: Pure Marine Collagen 2000mg 120 Capsules
tags: Skin and Nail Vitamins and Supplements
products.descriptionText:
What Are Pure Marine Collagen Capsules?
Are you looking to find a natural way to give your ageing skin a bit of a lift? Collagen has become the new talk of the town in the world of skincare, and it might just be exactly what you need!
Our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules are specially designed to support your body's natural beauty from within. They’re packed with hydrolysed Type 1 and Type 3 collagen, the two key types found naturally in your skin, bones, and joints. Thanks to their hydrolysed form, they’re easier for your body to absorb , helping you get the most from every dose.
Each serving delivers a powerful 1200mg of premium fish collagen peptides, making it a strong and simple way to top up your body’s collagen levels. Feel the benefit of collagen from the inside out with our Marine Collagen Capsules today!
Let your body harness the collagen glow with our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules.
Benefits Of Pure Marine Collagen Capsules
Did you know that collagen makes up nearly 30% of all the proteins in your body? It plays a vital role in building connective tissue in various body parts, from your skin and joints to your bones and muscles. But as the years roll on, our natural collagen production starts to slow down, which manifests as signs of premature ageing, joint aches, weak bones and thinning hair.
That’s where Pure Marine Collagen Capsules step in. Here's how our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules impact you:
Naturally helps replenish your collagen levels
Designed for taking care of your skin, bones, joints and muscles
Essential for maintaining your hair as collagen is found in the hair scalp
Provides hydrolysed collagen peptides for easier absorption and impactful results
Why Choose Pure Marine Collagen Capsules?
Here's why our hydrolysed marine collagen supplements stand out from the rest!
Provides both Type 1 and Type 3 collagen , unlike many standard collagen supplements that only offer Type 1
Sustainably sourced from wild-caught deep-sea fish, delivering premium collagen peptides free from pesticides and hormones
Free from GMOs, Magnesium stearate, TSE/BSE, and artificial additives , making it safe for everyday use
Independently lab-tested for heavy metals and contaminants to guarantee purity and nothing unwanted
Just 2 capsules a day to meet your daily collagen needs, with a generous 2-month supply in every bottle
Gluten-free formula, ideal for those with gluten intolerance
Perfectly suited for ketogenic, paleo, banting, and low-carb diets , so you can stay on track without compromising your diet preference
Unflavoured and odourless capsules with no fishy or bitter aftertaste , making them easy to take
Backed by a 90-day money-back guarantee , giving you the chance to try it risk-free
Packed in recyclable bottles to help lower our carbon footprint and support a greener future

Unlike regular ashwagandha supplements, ours deliver a potent 1500mg of high-absorbing ashwagandha KSM-66 , all in a vegan-friendly formula. With 180 tablets in every bottle, you’ll be covered for a full six months without frequent reorders .

Naturally rich in compounds like withanolides, ashwagandha is classed as an adaptogen (a substance that helps the body adapt to stressors)
Supports a sense of calm, focus , and emotional balance
Contains dietary fibre, which is great for normal bowel regularity and food regulation
Rich source of iron, which is known to contribute to the normal function of the immune system and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue

100% vegan and gluten-free ashwagandha dietary supplements, suitable for all, including vegans, vegetarians and those with gluten intolerance

products.name: Calcium, Magnesium and Zinc with Vitamin D3 400 Tablets
products.weightworldTitle: Calcium, Magnesium & Zinc With Vitamin D3
products.descriptionText:
Modern life and busy schedules can make it difficult to get all of the vital nutrients, vitamins and minerals we need to be at our best, no matter how much effort we put into balancing our diet. Give yourself a boost with Calcium, Magnesium and Zinc with Vitamin D3 from Weightworld. Featuring a whole range of incredible vitamins and minerals that support the bones, muscles and natural defences , it’s a fantastic way to supplement a modern diet and feel at your best.
What Is Calcium, Magnesium, and Zinc with Vitamin D3?
Our Calcium Magnesium Zinc and Vitamin D3 tablets contain three of your body’s most important minerals. Though all of them can be found in a variety of food sources, it can be difficult to ensure you're getting the right amount while juggling a busy work schedule or taking care of the kids. These easy-to-take supplements ensure that your body is never lacking, so you can get on with your day whilst feeling your best.
Key Ingredients & Benefits
Our Calcium Magnesium Zinc and Vitamin D3 tablets consists of the following key ingredients -
Calcium
Calcium is renowned for its vital role in the maintenance of our bones, but did you know that it helps ensure proper nerve function and targets the heart too? As calcium is most frequently found in dairy products, supplementation is a good way to ensure you get all the calcium your body needs, no matter your diet or lifestyle.
Magnesium
Magnesium is another amazing mineral that your body needs. It helps boost energy levels, targets the heart and also aids in your body’s recovery from damage.
Zinc
Zinc is yet another vital mineral for the body’s upkeep. It helps create collagen, which is crucial to our bones and skin, also helps the body heal, and even gives your immune system a boost.
Combined, all of the amazing ingredients in our Calcium Magnesium Zinc and Vitamin D3 tablets can:
Support your bones and mood
Maintain your natural defences
Regulate normal blood sugar levels
Perfect for sleep and peaceful nights
Who Is It for?
For anyone looking to supplement their diet and target various aspects of their body such as bones, immunity, muscle function, and growth. It can be taken by vegetarians. This supplement is suitable for adults over the age of 18.

products.name: Multivitamin Gummies for Women 90 Gummies
products.descriptionText:

So, don’t settle for less when you can thrive with our Multivitamin Gummies for Women!
How Our Multivitamin Gummies Benefit Women?
While we already know multivitamins are important for our bodies, let’s find out how the powerful nutrients in our Multivitamin Gummies help you tick your well-being and beauty goals!
Women’s Cycle
Women’s monthly cycles are regulated by the release of hormones. Iodine contributes to the normal production of thyroid hormones and Vitamin B6 contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity. Plus, Evening Primrose is known to support women’s cycles and help manage the PMS struggles.
Skin & Hair
Vitamins A, B7, C, Iodine and Zinc support youthful skin while Biotin (B7) and Zinc help in the maintenance of your hair. Evening Primrose Oil and Hyaluronic Acid (HLA) are also perfect for managing the appearance of ageing and maintaining gorgeous hair, helping you rediscover your natural beauty.
Energy
Calcium, Iodine and vitamins B6, B7, B12 & C contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism, which is ideal for food regulation and replenishing your energy. Coenzyme Q10 also assists in the production of natural ATP energy levels, helping you re-energise after a hectic day.
Bones, Muscles & Joints
Calcium, Zinc, Vitamin C, Evening Primrose Oil and HLA support your bone strength. Besides bone strength, Calcium and HLA are known to be ideal for joint flexibility, assisting you in easy mobility.
Natural Defences
Vitamins A, B6, B9, B12, C and E, Zinc and Coenzyme Q10 are credited for helping fortify your bodily resistance against unwanted invaders in your bodies.
Why Choose Our Multivitamin Gummies for Women?
While there are many multivitamin supplements available on the market, here’s what makes our Multivitamin Gummies for Women stand out from the rest!
Advanced Formula
Power-packed with 10 vitamins and minerals plus HLA, Coenzyme Q10 and omega-rich Evening Primrose Oil, a revolutionary formula hard to find elsewhere
Tablets? Nay! Gummies? Yay!
Our Strawberry- and Raspberry-flavoured gummies offer you a tasty and easy-to-chew way to get all the essential nutrients, unlike bitter and hard-to-swallow multivitamin tablets

products.name: Glucosamine and Chondroitin 180 Capsules
tags: Skin and Nail Vitamins and Supplements
products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Glucosamine, Chondroitin & MSM Capsules?
Looking to naturally boost your body's glucosamine and chondroitin levels? Give our Glucosamine, Chondroitin and MSM Capsules a go!
Packed with a potent mix of 1000mg of glucosamine and 200mg of chondroitin sulphate in just two capsules, this high-strength supplement is also power-packed with vitamin C, hyaluronic acid, organic turmeric and MSM , offering you more than just the bare minimum benefits given by most joint supplements.
Each bottle comes with 180 easy-to-swallow capsules, keeping you stocked up for several months without the hassle of reordering. Feel the power of two vital compounds in one capsule with our Glucosamine and Chondroitin Capsules today!
Benefits of Glucosamine, Chondroitin and MSM Capsules
Glucosamine and chondroitin are important compounds naturally found in your cartilage (the cushioning tissue between your joints). But as we age, our body's natural production of these compounds starts declining. That’s where our Glucosamine & Chondroitin Capsules step in to lend a hand. Here’s how the key ingredients in our chondroitin and glucosamine supplements can support you:
Help replenish your body’s natural levels of glucosamine and chondroitin
Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of bones, cartilage, gums, teeth and skin*
Turmeric is naturally packed with manganese, which contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and the normal formation of connective tissue*
Manganese contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
Provides extra goodness from natural powerhouses like hyaluronic acid and MSM
Why Choose Our Glucosamine, Chondroitin & MSM Capsules?
Here’s why our Glucosamine Complex Capsules make a wise pick for your wellness -
Backed by over 19 years of industry experience in formulating more than 150 wellness supplements and devices
Delivers a 1200mg dose of glucosamine sulfate & chondroitin sulphate in just two handy capsules
Contains added vitamin C, turmeric, hyaluronic acid, and MSM, a powerful combo you won’t easily find in standard glucosamine supplements
Our capsules are free from gluten , making them suitable for those with specific dietary needs
Only 1 to 2 easy-to-swallow glucosamine sulphate with chondroitin capsules a day, giving you a supply of up to six months in one go
GMP-certified and 100% free from GMOs and magnesium stearate to offer you the WeightWorld reliability
Covered by our 100% money-back guarantee within 90 days , so you can try the capsules risk-free

products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Vitamin B Complex Tablets?
B vitamins are vital to your body and mind, but combining the essential B vitamins in the right amount can be tricky. That's why we have formulated Vitamin B Complex Tablets, offering a perfect blend of 8 crucial B Vitamins in one tablet.
Unlike other vitamin B tablets, ours is enriched with vitamin C to give you well-rounded daily support. Each bottle contains 365 easy-to-swallow tablets, keeping you replenished for a whole year. Harness the benefits of nine vital vitamins with one Vitamin B Complex Tablet today!
Benefits of Vitamin B Complex Tablets
Our B Vitamin Complex Tablets are designed to support your well-being throughout the year by providing a powerful blend of essential nutrients. Here’s how they help:
Vitamin B12 contributes to normal psychological function*
Biotin (Vitamin B7) contributes to the maintenance of normal hair & skin*
Vitamin C and vitamin B12 contribute to the normal function of the immune system*
Riboflavin (vitamin B2), vitamin B12 and vitamin C contribute to the reduction of tiredness & fatigue*
Riboflavin (vitamin B2), vitamin B12 and vitamin C contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
Vitamin B12, Riboflavin and vitamin C contribute to the normal functioning of the nervous system*
Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin, bones, teeth, and gums*
Why Choose Our Vitamin B Complex Tablets?
Here’s why we and our B vitamin complex tablets stand out from the regular vitamin B supplements -
Made with 20+ years of experience in creating 150+ trusted wellness supplements and fitness devices
Packed with all 8 essential B vitamins and added vitamin C, a powerful blend that’s hard to come by
365 tablets per bottle for a massive 1-year supply in one go, more than most competitors offer
Just 1 easy-to-take B vitamin complex tablet a day, so you don't need to take multiple doses
100% vegan and vegetarian-friendly, to be suitable for everyone irrespective of dietary choices
Packed in recyclable PET bottles to lower our carbon footprint and be a more sustainable choice
Made to high GMP-certified standards to offer you the WeightWorld reliability
Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee, allowing you to try the tablets with confidence
*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).
